CL-09.title: Page Loading Speed
CL-09.description: The website has slow loading speed, leading to high bounce rates and poor user experience.
CL-09.remediation: Optimize images, minify CSS and JavaScript files, and leverage browser caching to enhance page loading speed.

CL-14.title: SEO-Friendly URLs
CL-14.description: The website uses non-descriptive URLs that are not optimized for search engine visibility.
CL-14.remediation: Implement SEO-friendly URLs with relevant keywords to improve search engine rankings and user experience.

CL-08.title: Optimize JavaScript Execution
CL-08.description: Optimize the execution of JavaScript code to enhance website performance.

CL-09.title: Compress Text Files
CL-09.description: Compress text files to reduce website loading times.

CL-10.title: Minimize HTTP Requests
CL-10.description: Reduce the number of HTTP requests to speed up website loading.
CL-10.remediation: Combine or eliminate unnecessary resources to minimize HTTP requests.

CL-05.title: Page Load Speed
CL-05.description: Optimize website to ensure fast page load speeds
CL-05.remediation: Regularly monitor and optimize website performance to maintain fast load speeds

CL-06.title: Lazy Loading
CL-06.description: Use lazy loading for images and resources to improve loading times.

CL-07.title: Minification of CSS/JS
CL-07.description: CSS and JS files should be minified to reduce file size.
CL-07.remediation: Minify CSS and JS files for faster loading.

CL-15.title: Load Time Optimization
CL-15.description: Optimize website for fast load times.
CL-15.remediation: Optimize images, resources, and server response times for faster loading.

CL-09.title: Page Load Speed
CL-09.description: Optimize website performance to ensure fast page load speeds.

CL-10.title: Minify CSS and JavaScript
CL-10.description: Reduce file sizes by minifying CSS and JavaScript resources.
